scripts.dev: bun run --filter "@recalllayer/api" dev & bun run --filter "@recalllayer/web" dev
scripts.build: bun run --filter "@recalllayer/shared" build && bun run --filter "@recalllayer/db" generate && bun run --filter "@recalllayer/db" build && bun run --filter "@recalllayer/core" build && bun run --filter "@recalllayer/api" build && bun run --filter "@recalllayer/web" build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter "@recalllayer/shared" typecheck && bun run --filter "@recalllayer/db" typecheck && bun run --filter "@recalllayer/core" typecheck && bun run --filter "@recalllayer/api" typecheck && bun run --filter "@recalllayer/web" typecheck
scripts.prod:check: bun run typecheck && bun run db:generate && bun node_modules/prisma/build/index.js validate --schema packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma && bun run build
